title: pouteria aurantium
intro: Pouteria aurantium, also known as the yellow sapote or yellow sapotier, is a tropical tree native to Central and South America, belonging to the family Sapotaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties, making it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Pouteria aurantium include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and alleviate symptoms of diabetes, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and protect against certain types of cancer. Herbal preparations of Pouteria aurantium include extracts, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed in various forms, such as tea, capsules, or topical creams, to harness its medicinal properties.
